title: need help finding the metaliic eva 01 and 04 revoltech set
display_title: need help finding the metaliic eva 01 and 04 revoltech set
wikitext:
[]: need help finding the metaliic eva 01 and 04 revoltech set             Quote Post by Atw622 » Thu Aug 18, 2011 12:48 am I found a set of Revoltech figures on eBay but the price was incredibly expensive. The set itself contained 013: version of Eva-04, and the 032 version of Ev-01 (new movie version) as well as the Positron rifle and ESV shield, both EVAs were special metallic versions and also came with an exclusive red lance of Longinus, I have been trying to find this pack of.figures for a while now, but the best I,could find were 2 packs on eBay going for $260 something (including shipping) and a $ 400 + auction as well, I have been hunting all over.Google.to no avail, and am hoping someone could point me in the right direction towards a cheaper version or at least one that I won't have to wait several weeks to be.delivered thank you! (This set is also known as the end of the system set or the.eve.set encased that helps

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Sat Aug 20, 2011 11:39 pm Good luck with that, as an expert Revoltech collector I can tell you: give up on that one... It is a very, VERY, limited edition, given only if you make many points playing "pachinko"... Probably they are not that expensive, but since they know you won't go for one yourself they decide the prices, no matter how high they may seem... Now, you won't find it outside of Asia, as I said, it's a Japan-only product and any other you may find in China is probably an unauthorized copy (and still it would be damm expensive...) If that's not enough I have other 2 reasons: A) You can have any of the things on that package for less money even when bougth separately (the positron Rifle and Shield can be found for less than $10) B) It's totally not worth it anymore as the Robot Damashis and EvaEvos exist... Now, if you really really want it, then Ebay is your only choice... But I can tell you, that package, the glow in the dark Eva 01 and the Yamashita color Eva 01 are some expensive, pointless bastards... Have a nice day!
